title: CONSOLIDATE Memory Optimization: Delta-Integrated Incremental Consolidation
description: Eliminate per-iteration full-relation snapshot copies in col_eval_stratum. Implement delta-integrated consolidation that outputs truly-new rows as byproduct, eliminating O(N) malloc+memcpy + O(N+D) merge walk per iteration per relation. Target: 2-4× CSPA performance improvement, peak RSS reduction from 4.46GB to <500MB.

stories.title: Phase A: Replace g_consolidate_ncols global with qsort_r context
stories.description: Prerequisite for thread-safe delta computation. Replace global state with context parameter.
acceptanceCriteria: g_consolidate_ncols global variable removed from columnar_nanoarrow.c
row_cmp() signature changed to row_cmp_fn(const void *a, const void *b, void *ctx)
All qsort() calls replaced with qsort_r() + context
All tests pass with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
Atomic commit: 'fix: replace g_consolidate_ncols global with qsort_r context'
clang-format applied and verified

stories.title: Design: col_op_consolidate_incremental_delta function specification
stories.description: Design new function that outputs delta as byproduct. TDD: Write specification before implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Function signature: col_op_consolidate_incremental_delta(col_rel_t *rel, uint32_t old_nrows, col_rel_t *delta_out)
Pseudocode documented: Phase 1 (sort delta), Phase 1b (dedup), Phase 2 (merge + emit new rows)
Algorithm complexity analyzed: O(D log D + N + D) time, O(N+D) memory
Edge cases specified: old_nrows==0 (first iteration), delta empty, all-duplicate delta
Memory ownership documented: caller responsible for delta_out->data
Integration point documented: replaces old_data snapshot + merge walk in col_eval_stratum
Test cases designed: 4+ edge cases for TDD

stories.title: TDD: Test harness for col_op_consolidate_incremental_delta
stories.description: Create comprehensive unit tests BEFORE implementing the function. TDD discipline.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: tests/test_consolidate_incremental_delta.c
Test cases: (1) empty old + delta → all new, (2) old + all-duplicate delta → unchanged, (3) old + unique delta → merged+new, (4) first iteration (old_nrows==0), (5) large random dataset
Correctness oracle: Verify merged result is sorted+unique, delta_out contains exactly R_new - R_old
Tests compile with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
Tests register in tests/meson.build
All tests currently FAIL (expected before implementation)
Test harness integrates into meson test -C build

stories.title: Implementation: col_op_consolidate_incremental_delta function
stories.description: Implement new consolidation function that outputs delta. Must pass all TDD tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Function implemented in wirelog/backend/columnar_nanoarrow.c (after col_op_consolidate_incremental)
All 5 test cases in tests/test_consolidate_incremental_delta.c PASS
Code compiles with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
clang-format applied
Atomic commit: 'feat: implement col_op_consolidate_incremental_delta with delta output'
No global state used (uses qsort_r from Phase A)
Function handles NULL delta_out gracefully (optional output)

stories.title: Integration: Replace old_data snapshot loop in col_eval_stratum
stories.description: Remove old_data snapshot pattern, integrate new delta-output consolidation. Eliminate O(N × iterations) memory traffic.
acceptanceCriteria: old_data malloc/memcpy loop (lines 1883-1900) REMOVED
snap[ri] row count only (O(1) snapshot)
col_op_consolidate_incremental_delta() call integrated (lines 2000-2070 replacement)
delta computation moves from separate merge walk to consolidate byproduct
All existing tests still pass
Compilation succeeds with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
clang-format applied
Atomic commit: 'fix: eliminate old_data snapshot, integrate delta-output consolidation'
No functional change to output (correctness gate)

stories.title: Validation: CSPA correctness after integration
stories.description: Verify CSPA produces identical output (20,381 tuples) after CONSOLIDATE optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: CSPA benchmark compiles: meson compile -C build bench_flowlog
CSPA runs: ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload cspa
Output fact count: 20,381 tuples (matches baseline exactly)
All other workloads (TC, Reach, CC, SSSP, etc.) produce identical output
Atomic commit: 'test: verify CSPA correctness after CONSOLIDATE integration'
No regressions on non-CSPA workloads

stories.title: Performance: Peak RSS reduction measurement
stories.description: Measure peak RSS before/after. Target: 4.46GB → <500MB (90% reduction from old_data snapshots).
acceptanceCriteria: Baseline measurement recorded: /usr/bin/time -l ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload cspa (3 runs)
Peak RSS before optimization: documented as 4.46GB (known from earlier profiling)
Peak RSS after optimization: measured with /usr/bin/time -l
Target: <500MB (eliminating O(N × iterations × relations) snapshots)
Memory improvement documented: percentage reduction from baseline
Atomic commit: 'perf: document peak RSS reduction after CONSOLIDATE optimization'

stories.title: Performance: Wall time improvement measurement
stories.description: Measure wall time improvement. Target: 2-4× speedup from eliminating memory allocation overhead.
acceptanceCriteria: Baseline wall time recorded: 35.3s (median, from earlier profiling)
Wall time after optimization: measured (3 runs, median)
Speedup calculated: (baseline - optimized) / baseline × 100%
Target: 2-4× improvement (reducing per-iteration memory traffic impact)
Iteration count documented (unchanged, but per-iteration cost reduced)
Atomic commit: 'perf: document wall time improvement after CONSOLIDATE optimization'

stories.title: Regression: Full benchmark suite validation
stories.description: Verify all 15 workloads produce identical output and no performance regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Full benchmark run: ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload all
All 15 workloads complete without error
Output fact counts identical to baseline for all workloads
No workload regression (TC, Reach, CC, SSSP, Andersen, etc.)
Atomic commit: 'test: verify all 15 workloads pass regression suite'
Performance metrics recorded (median wall time, peak RSS for each)

stories.title: Architecture Verification: Architect review
stories.description: Architect (Opus) reviews implementation against acceptance criteria. Final gate before completion.
acceptanceCriteria: Architect review completed against specific acceptance criteria (not generic)
Implementation approach verified: delta-integrated consolidation correct
Memory optimization validated: old_data snapshots eliminated
Thread safety verified: qsort_r context-based (no global state)
Edge cases checked: first iteration, empty delta, all-duplicate delta
Code quality verified: -Wall -Wextra -Werror, clang-format applied
Architect approval documented

stories.title: Documentation: Final report and cleanup
stories.description: Document implementation, performance results, and lessons learned. Clean up progress.txt.
acceptanceCriteria: Report created: docs/performance/CONSOLIDATE-COMPLETION.md with algorithm, metrics, and ROI analysis
Progress.txt updated: final summary of all iterations and commits
Git log clean: All commits atomic with clear messages (no merge, no fixup)
No TODO/FIXME left in code (unless documented in report)
Atomic commit: 'docs: CONSOLIDATE optimization completion report'
All files linted and formatted
